name: Lev Shaddoll Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>凍てし心が映す神影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レヴシャドール・フュージョン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl_base: Divine Shadow Reflected in the Frozen Heart
desc: When this card is activated: Send 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can Tribute 1 Fusion Monster; Special Summon 1 "Shaddoll" Fusion Monster with a different Attribute from your Extra Deck (this is treated as a Fusion Summon), but change its ATK to 0. You can only use each effect of "Lev Shaddoll Fusion" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate either of this card's effects, except "Shaddoll" monsters.
eff: When this card is activated: Send 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can Tribute 1 Fusion Monster; Special Summon 1 "Shaddoll" Fusion Monster with a different Attribute from your Extra Deck (this is treated as a Fusion Summon), but change its ATK to 0. You can only use each effect of "Lev Shaddoll Fusion" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate either of this card's effects, except "Shaddoll" monsters.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Fusion Summon
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Normal Summons to archetype specific monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
